---
title: "Weekly Reflection"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
canvas:
  type: assignment
  published: true
  points: 0
  grading_type: pass_fail
  submission_types: [online_text_entry]
  omit_from_final_grade: true
---

# Weekly Reflection

Write a short reflection (200–300 words) on what you found most challenging in
this week's material on stress and strain.

This assignment is graded **complete/incomplete** and is **omitted from the
final grade**.
